ref_ALG.grain: one row per client group ID (aka ALG)

data_POSITIONS.grain: one row per position per account

data_ACTIVITY.filtersExclusions: excludes trade activity and dividend activity

data_REVENUE.grain: one row per account code per product code per date per advisor (Num Emp Fa)

ref_PRODUCT.filtersExclusions: missing certain product codes that have never been observed in data_REVENUE

ref_SECURITY.filtersExclusions: Only includes securities that data_POSITIONS is unable to classify

ref_WEALTHDESK.filtersExclusions: only includes accounts currently enrolled in an advisory program
